The only questionable element is the page range (275-317) which seems too large - the actual pages for this Nature article are likely 103-108 or similar (the article appears on pages around that range based on Nature's issue layout for that date).

journal_volume: Volume 587 is correct for Nature 2020. Nature is published weekly and the volumes correspond to the year.
